charge_descriptions.09-3: Possession/introduction/manufacture of any drug, narcotic intoxicant, tobacco, chemical, OR drug paraphernalia not prescribed by medical staff.
charge_descriptions.09-4: Possession or movement of money or currency, unless specifically authorized.
charge_descriptions.02-16: Refusal to submit to substance abuse testing.
charge_descriptions.09-5: Possession/introduction of clothing or property not issued to inmate nor authorized by the center/unit.
